---
title: "VacancyRadar — Employer Profile"
date: today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
jupyter: python3
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
params:
  employer_id: ""
---

```{python}
#| tags: [parameters]
employer_id = ""  # quarto -P employer_id=hh:1373
```

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime
import duckdb
import polars as pl
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.io as pio
pio.templates.default = "plotly_white"

if not employer_id:
    raise ValueError("Передайте --employer_id, например `quarto render employer_profile.qmd -P employer_id=hh:1373`")

import os
PROJECT_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent.parent if "__file__" in globals() else Path.cwd()
if not (PROJECT_ROOT / "master").exists():
    PROJECT_ROOT = Path(os.environ.get("VRADAR_ROOT", "."))
EVENTS_DB = PROJECT_ROOT / "master" / "events.duckdb"
_slim_override = os.environ.get("VRADAR_SLIM_PATH")
SLIM = Path(_slim_override) if _slim_override else PROJECT_ROOT / "derived" / "slim_active.parquet"

con = duckdb.connect(":memory:")
con.execute(f"ATTACH '{EVENTS_DB.as_posix()}' AS events_db (READ_ONLY)")
con.execute(f"CREATE VIEW slim AS SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{SLIM.as_posix()}')")
```

## Работодатель `{python} employer_id`

```{python}
header = con.execute(
    "SELECT employer_name, count(*) AS active FROM slim WHERE employer_id = ? GROUP BY 1",
    [employer_id],
).fetchone()
if header:
    name, n_active = header
    print(f"{name}: {n_active} активных вакансий")
else:
    print("работодатель не найден в slim_active")
```

## Активные вакансии

```{python}
active = con.execute(
    """
    SELECT title, city, seniority, remote_type,
        coalesce(salary_rub_min, salary_rub_max, 0)::INT AS salary_min,
        skills
    FROM slim WHERE employer_id = ?
    ORDER BY salary_min DESC NULLS LAST
    """,
    [employer_id],
).pl()
active
```

## События во времени

```{python}
bare = employer_id.replace("hh:", "")
events = con.execute(
    """
    SELECT CAST(ts AS DATE) AS day, type, count(*)::INT AS n
    FROM events_db.main.events WHERE employer_id = ?
    GROUP BY day, type ORDER BY day, type
    """,
    [bare],
).pl()
events
```

```{python}
if not events.is_empty():
    fig = px.bar(events.to_pandas(), x="day", y="n", color="type", barmode="group",
                 labels={"day": "", "n": "events"},
                 title=f"События по {employer_id}")
    fig.update_layout(height=320)
    fig
```

---

*Сгенерировано VacancyRadar / `{python} f"{datetime.now():%Y-%m-%d %H:%M}"`*
